title: erigeron lyratus
intro: Erigeron lyratus, also known as the mountain fleabane or daisy fleabane, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its essential oils and flavonoids. Erigeron lyratus is said to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
